contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 1155
- Description: Large Spike Index — code review rectification (RX1–RX4) + regime gauge redesign
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1108
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1109
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1110
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1111
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1114
  
  Details:
  Rectification of the /large_spikes feature based on Claude's code review (LARGE_SPIKE_INDEX_REVIEW_AND_RECTIFICATION.md).
  
  PRs shipped:
  - #1108 (RX1): Wired LargeSpikeIndexRefresher at EOD (eod_hd_price_refresher.rb) and intraday (daily_trades_importer_intraday.rb) enqueue sites — fixes silent staleness where the spike index never refreshed at end-of-day.
  - #1109 (RX2): Regenerated db/schema.rb with large_spike column + index via db:migrate — fixes fresh DB setups where the column was missing.
  - #1110 (RX3): Added spike breadth chart — MacroIndicator.spike_* methods, chartjs_spike_* helpers, _spike_chart.html.erb partial plotting LARGE_SPIKE_INDEX (previously rendered the dip chart — wrong signal).
  - #1111 (RX4): Request specs for /large_spikes — 200, spikeChart rendering, non-trading-day redirect (required by OPERATING_INSTRUCTIONS §9).
  - #1114 (Regime Gauge): Redesigned breakout chart as a purpose-built regime gauge (Gary's specification). 3 series only: Participation, Norm, Over-extended threshold. Removed misleading 'Buy Zone' band. Y-axis in %, 'How to read this gauge' caption. Removed dead middle/lower bollinger code.
  
  Deployed to production (perch.truesight.me) via ./deploy.sh + db:migrate.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 1925.00

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
